Guest AccessReserve
About Aurelio House

Built around hospitality that feels composed, warm, and exacting.

Every element, from the menu structure to the room lighting, is calibrated to help guests settle into an evening worth remembering.

Brand story

From intimate supper clubs to a landmark dining address.

Aurelio House began as a chef-led series of private dinners for guests who wanted restaurant-grade craft in a more intimate, more thoughtful setting. That same attention now defines the full restaurant experience.

Today, the house is known for seasonal fire-led menus, sommelier pairings, and service shaped around quiet confidence rather than spectacle.

Mission & values

A premium restaurant should feel effortless for the guest and disciplined behind the scenes.

Ingredient integrity

Menus are built around produce at its peak and proteins sourced for flavor rather than volume.

Measured hospitality

Our team reads the room, respects pacing, and serves with quiet confidence.

Design-led comfort

Material warmth, balanced acoustics, and cinematic lighting shape the tone of each evening.

Consistency

Luxury is proven through reliability across service, flavor, and detail.

Founder & Executive Chef

Luca Moretti

Trained across Milan and Copenhagen, Chef Luca combines European finesse with charcoal-driven depth, building menus that feel both current and enduring.

Chef & founder

Leadership shaped by precision and restraint.

Chef Luca leads a team that values prep discipline, respectful sourcing, and service that feels present without intrusion.

Hospitality-led training

Every guest-facing touchpoint is rehearsed for warmth, clarity, and consistency.

Seasonal R&D

New dishes are prototyped monthly with a focus on texture, aroma, and pacing.

Atmosphere

An evening environment designed as carefully as the plates.

Walnut, brushed brass, leather banquettes, and layered lighting create a room that feels intimate even at full energy.
